data.title: Create tests/perf/ticket-list-timing.sh — baseline performance verification
data.description: Create tests/perf/ticket-list-timing.sh. Script provisions a TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR with 500 synthetic tickets (400 with .archived marker, 100 without), times 'ticket list' (exclude_archived=true) 3 times and asserts median < 2s. Confirms the fast-skip optimization is functioning. Not a unit test — a performance regression guard. Create tests/perf/ directory if it does not exist. Add executable bit. testing_mode: RED (new behavior: perf assertion that will fail before fast-skip is implemented, pass after).
